---
name: Provider Request
about: Request or submit a new AI provider for detection
title: 'providers: add [provider name]'
labels: provider
assignees: ''
---

**Provider name**
The name of the AI provider (e.g. "Fireworks AI").

**API hostname(s)**
The hostname(s) used by this provider's API (e.g. `api.fireworks.ai`).

**How you found the hostname**
How did you determine the hostname? (browser DevTools, API docs, running ai-ranger, etc.)

**Have you tested it?**
Did you add the hostname to `providers/providers.toml` and verify detection with the agent?

**Provider website**
Link to the provider's website or API documentation.

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information (dedicated IP ranges, multiple API endpoints, etc.).
